name: conformance-level
description: The RFC 2119 conformance classification for a requirement.

aiGuidance.purpose: The RFC 2119 conformance classification for a requirement.
aiGuidance.extraction: MUST: absolute requirement, no deviation permitted. SHOULD: recommended; valid reasons to ignore exist. MAY: truly optional. MUST-NOT and SHOULD-NOT are the negatives. Use consistent classification — do not downgrade MUST to SHOULD for convenience.
